languages.original_text: "The Bloodspun Web extols both the ability to end life and the art of continuing it in the service of the Undying One."

languages.text: "Кровавая паутина превозносит как умение прервать жизнь, так и искусство продолжить ее во благо служения Неумирающему".
"The Bloodspun Web extols both the ability to end life and the art of continuing it in the service of the Undying One."
languages.original_text: "Кровавая паутина превозносит как умение прервать жизнь, так и искусство продолжить ее во благо служения Неумирающему".

traits.locale_text: "The Bloodspun Web extols both the ability to end life and the art of continuing it in the service of the Undying One."
"The Bloodspun Web extols both the ability to end life and the art of continuing it in the service of the Undying One."
"The Bloodspun Web extols both the ability to end life and the art of continuing it in the service of the Undying One."

languages.text: 「血の糸の網は、生命を終わらせる力と、不死の者のために生命を続ける芸術を称賛している」
languages.original_text: "The Bloodspun Web extols both the ability to end life and the art of continuing it in the service of the Undying One."

traits.locale_text: 「血の糸の網は、生命を終わらせる力と、不死の者のために生命を続ける芸術を称賛している」

languages.text: « La Toile de Sang prône aussi bien l'art de donner la mort que celui de consacrer sa vie au service de l'Immortel. »
languages.original_text: "The Bloodspun Web extols both the ability to end life and the art of continuing it in the service of the Undying One."

traits.locale_text: « La Toile de Sang prône aussi bien l'art de donner la mort que celui de consacrer sa vie au service de l'Immortel. »

languages.text: "Das Blutgesponnene Netz preist die Fähigkeit, ein Leben zu beenden, und die Kunst, es im Dienst des Todlosen fortzuführen."
languages.original_text: "The Bloodspun Web extols both the ability to end life and the art of continuing it in the service of the Undying One."

traits.locale_text: "Das Blutgesponnene Netz preist die Fähigkeit, ein Leben zu beenden, und die Kunst, es im Dienst des Todlosen fortzuführen."

languages.text: "Kanipi Ağı, hem yaşamı sonlandırma yeteneğini hem de Ölmeyen'in hizmetinde onu sürdürme sanatını övüyor."
languages.original_text: "The Bloodspun Web extols both the ability to end life and the art of continuing it in the service of the Undying One."

traits.locale_text: "Kanipi Ağı, hem yaşamı sonlandırma yeteneğini hem de Ölmeyen'in hizmetinde onu sürdürme sanatını övüyor."

languages.text: «La Red Sanguinolenta elogia por igual la capacidad para quitar la vida y el arte de perpetuarla al servicio del Inmortal».
languages.original_text: "The Bloodspun Web extols both the ability to end life and the art of continuing it in the service of the Undying One."

traits.locale_text: «La Red Sanguinolenta elogia por igual la capacidad para quitar la vida y el arte de perpetuarla al servicio del Inmortal».

languages.text: “织血罗网颂扬终结生命的能力，也颂扬在侍奉不死之神时延续生命的艺术。”
languages.original_text: "The Bloodspun Web extols both the ability to end life and the art of continuing it in the service of the Undying One."

traits.locale_text: “织血罗网颂扬终结生命的能力，也颂扬在侍奉不死之神时延续生命的艺术。”
